title: Circular Score Field
caption: Sound accumulates in loops rather than moving toward resolution.

title: Time Does Not Progress Cleanly
caption: The sonic event returns changed each time it circles.

title: Microtonal Circle
caption: Circularity changes how pitch, memory, and expectation behave.

title: Event Accumulation
caption: Each ring carries its own cycle so events can meet, separate, and return in changing combinations.

title: First Rotation
caption: Place a sound event on a ring, set its cycle, and hear the first alignment establish a reference pattern.

title: Returning Rotation
caption: Alter tuning, density, or position between passes so recurrence carries audible change rather than exact repetition.

title: Open Cadence
caption: The circular score supports modal and microtonal movement without requiring every cycle to resolve to a fixed tonal center.

title: Relation to Localization Gap
caption: To audit cultural erasure, the archive first has to describe what the machine cannot measure.

title: Interface Study
caption: The current interface study defines the interaction; a playable public proof remains in development.

title: The Loop Remains Open
caption: The event returns, but never as the same sound.
